results.rendered_html:
sam-√bandh P. -badhnāti, to bind or fasten or tie together, bind or fix on, attach, connect, join, construct, form,  ŚBr.  &c. &c.;
to procure, furnish, supply,  Ragh.  :
Pass. -badhyate, to be bound or fastened together &c.;
to be connected with or supplied, belong to,  Kāś.  on  Pāṇ. i, 4, 51  &c. :
Caus. -bandhayati, to cause to bind or be bound together &c.,  R. ;
to cause to connect with or refer to (instr.),  Kull.  on  Mn. v, 85.
